summary: Tested partner_verification email template visibility feature. Backend: 7/7 tests pass - platform admin sees partner_verification with category=platform_admin_only, partner admin sees NO platform_admin_only or partner_billing templates. Frontend: Platform admin sees 'Platform Admin Templates' section with violet styling and 'Partner Account Verification' (partner_verification) template. Partner admin sees NO Platform Admin Templates section and NO partner_verification template. All features working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: All implementation correct: email_templates.py correctly filters out platform_admin_only and partner_billing categories for non-platform admins. ensure_seeded() correctly seeds platform_admin_only templates only for automate-accounts tenant. Frontend EmailSection.tsx correctly shows Platform Admin Templates section only when isPlatformAdmin=true (covers both platform_admin and platform_super_admin roles).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner verification email template feature is FULLY WORKING. Platform admin (admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!, partner code: automate-accounts) sees Platform Admin Templates section with violet styling and Partner Account Verification template (partner_verification trigger). Partner admin (alice@testpartner.com / TestPass123!, partner code: test-partner-corp) sees NO Platform Admin Templates section and NO partner_verification template. The platform admin login flow requires: enter partner code 'automate-accounts' → Continue → email/password → Sign In. Note: API GET /api/admin/email-templates works with platform super admin token (role=platform_super_admin, tenant_id=null). Backend filter correctly excludes platform_admin_only and partner_billing categories for non-platform-admin roles.
test_screenshots: /app/test_reports/iter263_06_platform_admin_templates.jpeg (shows Platform Admin Templates section with violet styling + Partner Account Verification template)
/app/test_reports/iter263_08_partner_admin_email_templates.jpeg (shows partner admin view - no Platform Admin Templates section)
